title: Key Milestones in Blockchain History
description: A chronological timeline showing the major events and publications that led to the development and evolution of blockchain technology.
elements: 1991: Stuart Haber & W. Scott Stornetta - First describe a cryptographically secured chain of blocks
1998: Nick Szabo - Conceptualizes 'Bit Gold', a decentralized digital currency
2008: Satoshi Nakamoto - Publishes the Bitcoin Whitepaper
2009: Genesis Block - The first Bitcoin block is mined, launching the network
2013: Vitalik Buterin - Releases the Ethereum Whitepaper, introducing smart contracts
relationships: Chronological progression of foundational ideas leading to the first implementation and subsequent major platform evolution
